title: primula modesta subsp. fauriei
intro: Primula modesta subsp. fauriei, also known as the Korean primrose, is a subspecies of the Primula modesta plant, a type of flowering plant in the primrose family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Primula modesta subsp. fauriei include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are traditionally used in Korean and Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
